info.name: Attendance Management System API
info.description:
Full API collection for the Attendance Management System (Express + MongoDB). Covers auth, users, attendance, leaves, holidays, weekends, salary, salary structure, payroll runs, bonuses, reimbursements, loans, salary advances, reports, settings, notifications and dashboard endpoints, with all request arguments (body/query/path).

Setup:
1. Import the accompanying environment file `attendance-management-api.postman_environment.json` and select it.
2. Run `Auth > Login` (or `Register` then `Login`) - the token is saved automatically to the `token` environment variable and used by every other request via Bearer auth.
3. Admin-only endpoints require logging in with a user whose `role` is `admin`.

request.description: Required: employeeCode, email, password (min 6 chars), firstName, lastName. Optional: phone, department, designation, joiningDate, baseSalary, role (default employee).
Required: email, password.
Required: refreshToken.
Required: currentPassword, newPassword (min 6 chars).

formdata.description: Excel file (.xlsx) with columns: EmployeeCode, Email, Password, FirstName, LastName, Phone, Department, Designation, JoiningDate, BaseSalary

request.description: Only these fields are allowed: phone, address, emergencyContact, avatarUrl.
Any user field except password/refreshToken.
All fields optional: location, latitude, longitude, device, photoUrl.
All fields optional: location, latitude, longitude, device, photoUrl.
Required: attendanceRecordId, reason. Optional: requestedCheckIn, requestedCheckOut (ISO date strings).
Required: status (approved | rejected). rejectionReason required if rejected.
Required: startDate, endDate. Optional: userIds (array, locks all users if omitted/empty).
Required: leaveTypeId, startDate, endDate, reason. Optional: attachmentUrl.
Required: status (approved | rejected). rejectionReason required if rejected.
Required: holidays (array of holiday objects).
Required: configs (array of { dayOfWeek, isWeekend }).
Employees only ever see finalized slips (status approved | published | paid).

query.description: draft | generated | approved | rejected | published | paid

request.description: Self (own slip) or admin (any slip).
Self (own slip) or admin (any slip). Generates the PDF on demand if it doesn't exist yet.
Recomputes attendance/leave/bonus/deductions from scratch. Fails if the slip is locked or already published/paid.
Only slips with status 'generated' can be approved.
Optional: reason. Fails if the slip is locked.
Only approved slips can be published. Publishing makes the slip visible to the employee and locks it.
Published/paid slips cannot be unlocked.
Only published slips can be marked as paid. Optional: paymentMethod, transactionId.
Generates the PDF on demand if needed, then emails it to the employee.
Self (own structure) or admin (any employee).

Creating requires monthlyGrossSalary and annualCTC. Editing an existing structure auto-archives the previous version into revisionHistory. calculationType: fixed | percentage. baseComponent: monthlyGrossSalary | basicSalary.
Self (own history) or admin (any employee).
Defaults to the current month/year if omitted.

Single entry point - dispatches by which fields are present: userId -> single employee, department (no userId) -> department, neither -> company-wide (optionally scoped by userIds array). Required in all cases: month (1-12), year.
Required: userId, month (1-12), year. Creates/regenerates the slip and a Payroll run record.
Required: department, month (1-12), year. Generates slips for every active non-admin employee in the department.
Required: month (1-12), year. Optional: userIds (array, generates for every active non-admin employee if omitted/empty).

query.description: draft | processing | completed | approved | rejected | published | locked

request.description: Returns the run with its populated slips.
Approves the run and cascades approval to every slip in it.
Rejects the run and cascades rejection to every slip in it. Optional: reason.
Run must be approved first. Publishing makes every slip visible to its employee and locks it.
Unlocks the run and every non-published/paid slip in it.

query.description: draft | generated | approved | rejected | published | paid

request.description: Returns { summary, records } - summary totals plus every matching salary slip.
Streams an .xlsx file (Content-Type: application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet). In Postman, use 'Send and Download' to save the file.
Returns { payrollCycleDay, defaultCurrency, autoLockEnabled, lockAfterDays, latePolicy }. latePolicy is the same policy payroll calculation reads at generation time.
Partial update - only send the fields you want to change.
Required: userId, bonusType (monthly | performance | festival | yearly), amount, month (1-12), year.
Optional: reason.
Fails if the bonus has already been applied to a salary slip.

formdata.description: travel | fuel | internet | medical | food | other
Admin only: file on behalf of an employee

request.description: Required: category, amount, expenseDate. Self by default; admins may pass userId to file on behalf of an employee.

query.description: travel | fuel | internet | medical | food | other

request.description: Optional: reason.
Fails if the reimbursement has already been applied to a salary slip.

Required: loanAmount, emiAmount, tenureMonths, startMonth (1-12), startYear. Self by default (status becomes 'pending'); admins may pass userId to create on behalf of an employee (auto-approved, status 'active').

query.description: pending | approved | rejected | active | closed | cancelled

request.description: Self (own loan) or admin (any loan). Includes EMI deduction history.
Only pending loans can be approved.

Required: amount, deductionPerMonth, startMonth (1-12), startYear. Self by default (status becomes 'pending'); admins may pass userId to create on behalf of an employee (auto-approved, status 'active').
Only pending advances can be approved.
Required: settingValue.
Required: enabled (boolean).

body.raw:
{
  "userId": "{{employeeId}}",
  "title": "Leave Approved",
  "message": "Your leave request has been approved.",
  "type": "info",
  "actionUrl": ""
}

request.description: Required: userId, title, message. Optional: type (default info), actionUrl.
